name: Invoice Redirect Fraud with Tip Bait
description: Scammer fakes a payment failure to redirect freelancer to send an invoice to a suspicious off-platform email

conversation.speaker: scammer
conversation.message: I want to pay for your services but Fiverr says my card is not working on the platform today.

conversation.speaker: target
conversation.message: That's strange. You could try a different card or contact Fiverr support.

conversation.speaker: scammer
conversation.message: Can you send me an invoice to moneytransfer99@protonmail.com? I'll pay via bank transfer and add a 20% tip for the inconvenience.

red_flags: Tip bait to incentivize bypassing platform
